scripts.test: pnpm --filter @vdp/web test && pnpm --filter @vdp/server test:unit && pnpm --filter @vdp/server test:integration
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && rm -rf .turbo apps/**/.turbo packages/**/.turbo apps/**/dist packages/**/dist whisper-cache apps/**/.next
